sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for SNES version

special_mechanics.name: Aerial Diagonal Drill Attack
special_mechanics.description: Aero can perform a diagonal drill attack while airborne to damage enemies

special_mechanics.name: Star Projectile
special_mechanics.description: Limited stars can be shot to attack enemies

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. No precise movement physics parameters documented in available sources. Sources contain only gameplay descriptions and development history. SNES version features Mode 7 bonus levels and specific level design (4 worlds with 5 levels each). Gameplay involves passing through hoops, platform disappearance mechanics, and roller coaster sections.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Aero the Acro-Bat (SNES)
